notes: Economic defaults are screening values anchored to public reports where possible.
X. flavus GJ10 biological parameters remain explicit assumptions because public strain-specific industrial datasets are sparse.
Chemical input prices should be replaced with supplier quotes for design-grade TEA.
LCA factors are cradle-to-gate screening proxies and should be swapped for project-specific ecoinvent mappings when available.
priority_order: US federal statistics and public datasets
National laboratory TEA and hydrogen reports
World Bank and public commodity benchmarks
